mentions.note: Direct Bitcoin exposure preferred over leveraged crypto plays; Cramer owns it and sees good long-term value.
Relentless decline signals excessive speculation; charts are among worst Cramer has ever seen; leverage and 2x/3x ETF propping may not hold; potential for sharp further downside.
Down sharply as speculators liquidate crypto holdings to raise cash for SpaceX/mega-IPOs. Crypto holders are speculators, not hedgers, willing to flip deals on day one.

After 6-month decline from $126K to low 60Ks, technician Larry Williams signals 85% cycle bias to rally through June; undervalued vs. gold; animal spirits and risk appetite returning; bottom in place.
Buy Bitcoin directly; don't use derivative strategies for exposure; simple, direct ownership.
